meta.title: Bible geometric low-poly avatar prompts (51 set)
meta.note: 51-character set: includes Jesus' twelve disciples and Paul.

common_style: 2D cartoon character illustration, soft geometric low-poly look, gently faceted polygons, simplified clean shapes with rounded silhouette, medium facet count (not too many cuts), soft corners on facial planes, flat clean vector shading, solid color fills, non-photoreal, stylized illustrated adult face (age 25+), close-up portrait only, head-and-shoulders framing (chest-up), centered, single character, front-facing or front 3/4 view only, both eyes fully visible, facial features fully unobstructed, no profile-only view, no back view, no rear view, no body below chest, no hands, no props, transparent PNG background (alpha channel), no floor, no environment, no scene, high resolution, no text, no watermark, same character design system as a consistent set, same face proportions, same polygon density, same shading style, historically ancient biblical-era appearance, no modern accessories, no glasses, no eyewear
negative_prompt: realistic, photoreal, real human, live-action, photograph, street photo, studio photo, camera shot, DSLR, cinematic lighting, depth of field, bokeh, skin pores, natural skin texture, detailed hair strands, anime, manga, 3D render, clay, pixel art, gritty, dark, horror, complex background, scenery, solid background, white background, gradient background, floor, shadow plane, text, logo, watermark, chibi, child, kid, infant, toddler, minor, babyface, oversized head, back view, rear view, from behind, profile-only, hidden face, occluded face, full body, standing full-length, feet visible, hands visible, hand-held props, object in hand, weapon in hand, waist-up with hands, cropped face, cut off chin, jagged geometry, excessive faceting, too many sharp edges, hard angular cuts, female facial hair, beard on woman, mustache on woman, stubble on woman, glasses, eyeglasses, spectacles, eyewear, sunglasses, goggles, monocle, pince-nez, modern eyewear

palettes.primeval: soft beige + olive + sky blue accents
palettes.patriarch: warm sand + cream + muted teal accents
palettes.judges: olive green + clay brown + muted gold accents
palettes.monarchy: royal purple + navy + gold accents (still pastel)
palettes.prophets_exile: muted indigo + gray + parchment cream accents
palettes.post_exile_return: stone gray + sage green + parchment cream accents
palettes.gospels: cream + sky blue + soft rose accents
palettes.early_church: teal + sea blue + warm brown accents
